zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Symes於1510年出生在英國多瑟特阿林頓時，她的父親William Symes25歲，母親Agnes Colander20歲。她於1529年與Henry Way在英國多瑟特阿林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1605年在英國英格蘭多瑟特布利波特享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特布利波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Symes于1510年出生在英国多瑟特阿林頓时，她的父亲William Symes25岁，母亲Agnes Colander20岁。她于1529年与Henry Way在英国多瑟特阿林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1605年在英国英格兰多瑟特布利波特享年95岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特布利波特。

nameMeanings.name: Symes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Sims  .

variants.name: Sims
meanings: variant of Sim , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
topographic name for one who lived or worked at the house of someone called Symme (Simon).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Symes was born in 1510, in Allington, Dorset, England, her father, William Symes, was 25 and her mother, Agnes Colander, was 20. She married Henry Way in 1529, in Allington, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1605, in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95, and was buried in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Symes est née en 1510, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, William Symes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Colander, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Way en 1529, à Allington, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1605, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Symes(이)가 1510년 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Symes(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Colander(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 도르세트 앨링턴에서 Henry Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1605년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브리드포트에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브리드포트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Symes родилась в 1510 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Symes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Colander, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Way в 1529 г. в местности аллингтон, дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1605 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
